productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Solid Black Socks
description: It's comfort unparalleled once you slip into this pair of striped socks from united colors of benetton. A glimpse of these striped socks beneath a rolled up pair of jeans will lend your attired a hint of eccentric style.Made of 73% cotton, 25% nylon and 2% elastaneBlack and white stripes with a red patch at the toe region, blue heel patch and green mouthSock careMachine wash cold in not more than 30 degreesDo not dry cleanUse non-chlorine bleach if neededTumble dry lowDo not iron
